name: glassvault
description: Personal on-chain finance agent - private, gasless, and multi-chain.
author: GlassVault Team

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared && npm run build --workspace=apps/web && npm run build --workspace=apps/api
scripts.clean: npx rimraf apps/*/dist apps/*/node_modules packages/*/dist packages/*/node_modules node_modules
